source_pr.title: util: remove useless spmc
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

This PR removes useless spmc.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [x] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Bazel test metadata change/removal (e.g., removing `race = "on"`) as part of deleting unused util/gpool/spmc code.
failure_signature: Bazel metadata-only change (no concrete failure signature)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR mainly removes unused util/gpool/spmc code/tests and adjusts related Bazel metadata (including removing `race = "on"`). The case does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix tied to an observed flaky symptom. Keep as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: Code/test removal or Bazel metadata-only changes without a concrete flaky failure signature or targeted stabilization mechanism; keep as insufficient evidence.

evidence: files: util/gpool/BUILD.bazel, util/gpool/gpool.go, util/gpool/spinlock.go, util/gpool/spmc/BUILD.bazel, util/gpool/spmc/main_test.go, util/gpool/spmc/option.go, util/gpool/spmc/spmcpool.go, util/gpool/spmc/spmcpool_benchmark_test.go, util/gpool/spmc/spmcpool_test.go, util/gpool/spmc/worker.go, util/gpool/spmc/worker_loop_queue.go, util/gpool/spmc/worker_loop_queue_test.go
